purpose: Durable P17 aiflow queue for post-P16 Gateway and Cache baseline convergence, keeping P16 promotion-hold evidence machine-checkable while opening the next focused governance batch.

submissionCommands: go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P17-01-P16-COMPLETION-HANDOFF -title "P16 completion handoff" -description "Mark P16 as the latest completed governance batch and open P17 for Gateway/Cache baseline row convergence." -kind governance -priority 100

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P17-02-GATEWAY-CACHE-BASELINE-ROW-ATTACHMENT -title "Gateway cache baseline row attachment" -description "Attach committed Gateway/Cache baseline rows and keep promotion held unless sample prerequisites are complete." -kind governance -priority 99

go run -C /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/aiflow ./cmd/aiflow submit -root /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly -config /Users/bytedance/Codes/go/src/github/gofly/aiflow.yaml -id GOFLY-P17-03-GATEWAY-CACHE-ALLOCATION-PROMOTION-DECISION -title "Gateway cache allocation promotion decision" -description "Review one Gateway/Cache surface for allocation-blocking promotion after baseline rows exist, keeping latency report-only unless criteria pass." -kind governance -priority 98
aiflowSubmission.runtimeStatePolicy: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, bench/current.txt, bench/regression-report.json, bench/summary.md, bin/gofly, and docs/superpowers remain ignored local evidence and must not be committed.
aiflowSubmission.safetyPolicy: P17 tasks are submitted to ignored local aiflow runtime state and mirrored here as durable docs/reference evidence; each task must be completed in order and committed by the current agent or human only after its gate passes or an environment-limited downgrade is documented.

previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: P16 is treated as completed only when all three task rows in docs/reference/governance-p16-roadmap.json carry completion status, verification commands, and pending-current-commit placeholders owned by their per-task commits.
previousBatchHandoff.runtimeStatePolicy: Local .aiflow queue data is runtime evidence only; durable completion evidence belongs in docs/reference/governance-p16-roadmap.json and docs/reference/governance-boundary-inventory.json.

tasks.title: P16 completion handoff
tasks.objective: Convert P16 from active completed roadmap evidence into the latest completed governance batch and open P17 as the next active aiflow batch.
tasks.deliverable: P16 completed task evidence, P17 active roadmap, boundary inventory transition, dashboard convergence fields, and aiflow runtime-state exclusion proof.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after the P16 completion handoff and P17 active-batch evidence pass boundary inventory and governance report gates without staging ignored runtime state

tasks.title: Gateway cache baseline row attachment
tasks.objective: Attach committed Gateway and Cache baseline rows so allocation deltas can be compared without using ignored local benchmark output as durable evidence.
tasks.deliverable: Gateway/cache baseline row attachment policy, five-sample baseline inventory, repeated current-trend compatibility note, and no-promotion guardrail.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after Gateway/Cache baseline row evidence passes bench-regression-check and remains outside trackedBenchmarks unless every promotion prerequisite is present

tasks.title: Gateway cache allocation promotion decision
tasks.objective: Review whether exactly one Gateway or Cache surface can enter allocation-blocking coverage after baseline rows are attached, or keep promotion held with narrowed blockers.
tasks.deliverable: Promotion decision for one selected Gateway/Cache surface or an explicit hold decision with baseline diff, release note policy, and rollback guardrails.
tasks.commitPolicy: commit after allocation promotion decision passes bench-regression-check and keeps latency report-only unless maxRegressionRatio and rollback evidence are durable
